description_long: This is a cylindrical candle with a slightly irregular, crumpled surface and a partially torn upper rim, giving it a rustic, handmade appearance. The candle is housed in a translucent, frosted holder that appears to be made of glass or wax, with a visible seam and some surface imperfections. A decorative label on the front reads 'Berry Lemonade & Melon' and features floral graphics, suggesting a scented variety. The base is a flat, circular platform, possibly metallic or wax-coated, providing stability. The back and sides show more pronounced dents and tears, indicating wear or intentional design distress. The overall color palette is muted, with off-white, beige, and hints of brown, and the interior appears hollow, likely containing air and wax.
description: A rustic, cylindrical candle in a frosted holder with a decorative label and a distressed, torn rim. The surface is off-white and beige with visible dents and a flat base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the decorative label, torn rim, and the most intact surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a large dent and the absence of the label, with more visible surface irregularities.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying pronounced tears and crumples, with no label visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the label partially and the uneven rim, blending features of the front and side.
